languages.text: {n}Батошски лишь ухмыляется, задирая штанину. Его голень изуродована кислотой.{/n} "Плюются шарами со жгучим соком. Когда такой шар падает, все вокруг ошпаривает. Пыльцой брызжет еще, но мы так и не поняли зачем. Вроде безвредная. Если увидите, что в лужу ядовитую цветок растекся — не верьте, очередной обман. Подождете немного — и он опять на месте".

{n}Batoshski smirks, baring a shin hideously scarred by an acid burn.{/n} "It spits globs of caustic sap. Anything they hit gets sizzled. It also sprays pollen for some reason. It seems harmless though. But if you see a flower dissolve into a puddle of acid, don't think it's safe for a second, it's just another trick. Wait a little while and that flower will be back up again."
languages.original_text: {n}Батошски лишь ухмыляется, задирая штанину. Его голень изуродована кислотой.{/n} "Плюются шарами со жгучим соком. Когда такой шар падает, все вокруг ошпаривает. Пыльцой брызжет еще, но мы так и не поняли зачем. Вроде безвредная. Если увидите, что в лужу ядовитую цветок растекся — не верьте, очередной обман. Подождете немного — и он опять на месте".

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski smirks, baring his shin hideously scarred by acid.{/n} "It spits balls of caustic sap. Anything they hit gets scorched. It also sprays pollen for some reason. It seems harmless though. If you see a poisonous flower spreading in a puddle, don't believe it for a second, it's just another ruse. Wait a little while and the flower will be back in its place."

{n}Batoshski smirks, baring a shin hideously scarred by an acid burn.{/n} "It spits globs of caustic sap. Anything they hit gets sizzled. It also sprays pollen for some reason. It seems harmless though. But if you see a flower dissolve into a puddle of acid, don't think it's safe for a second, it's just another trick. Wait a little while and that flower will be back up again."

"You're beginning to understand, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Those damned flowers are... the worst of the lot. They release some kind of poisonous spores, and they can digest human flesh from a distance — don't ask me how. If you see a poisonous flower spreading in a puddle, don't believe it for a second, it's just another ruse. Wait a little while and the flower will be back in its place, foul thing that it is."

"You're beginning to understand, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Those damned flowers are... the worst of the lot. They release some kind of poisonous spores, and they can digest human flesh from a distance — don't ask me how. If you see a poisonous flower melting into a puddle, don't believe it for a second, it's just another ruse. Wait a little while and the flower will be back in its place, foul thing that it is."

If you see a poisonous flower spreading in a puddle, don't believe it for a second, it's just another ruse. Wait a little while and the flower will be back in its place."

It seems harmless though. But if you see a flower dissolve into a puddle of acid, don't think it's safe for a second, it's just another trick. Wait a little while and that flower will be back up again."

{n}Batoshski smirks, baring a shin hideously scarred by an acid burn.{/n} "It spits globs of caustic sap. Anything they hit gets sizzled. It also sprays pollen for some reason. It seems harmless though. But if you see a flower dissolve into a puddle of acid, don't think it's safe for a second, it's just another trick. Wait a little while and that flower will be back up again."

languages.text: 「少し分かってこられたようですね、閣下。あの忌々しい花が……中でも最悪だ。毒の胞子を放つうえ、離れた場所から人間の肉を消化できる――どういう理屈かは聞かないでくれ。水たまりに毒花が広がっているのを見ても、一瞬たりとも信じるな。ただの手口だ。少し待てば、あの忌まわしい花は元の場所に戻っている」
languages.original_text: "You're beginning to understand, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. Those damned flowers are... the worst of the lot. They release some kind of poisonous spores, and they can digest human flesh from a distance — don't ask me how. If you see a poisonous flower spreading in a puddle, don't believe it for a second, it's just another ruse. Wait a little while and the flower will be back in its place, foul thing that it is."

traits.locale_text: 「少し分かってこられたようですね、閣下。あの忌々しい花が……中でも最悪だ。毒の胞子を放つうえ、離れた場所から人間の肉を消化できる――どういう理屈かは聞かないでくれ。水たまりに毒花が広がっているのを見ても、一瞬たりとも信じるな。ただの手口だ。少し待てば、あの忌まわしい花は元の場所に戻っている。」

languages.text: {n}Avec un sourire en coin, Batoshski découvre un tibia atrocement défiguré par une brûlure à l'acide.{/n} « Elles crachent des globules de sève corrosive qui ronge tout ce qu'elle touche. Et pour une raison quelconque, elles libèrent également des nuages de pollen, inoffensifs ceux-là. Mais si vous voyez une fleur se dissoudre dans une flaque d'acide, méfiez-vous, c'est encore un de ses subterfuges. Attendez quelques instants, et elle se relèvera comme par magie. »
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski smirks, baring a shin hideously scarred by an acid burn.{/n} "It spits globs of caustic sap. Anything they hit gets sizzled. It also sprays pollen for some reason. It seems harmless though. But if you see a flower dissolve into a puddle of acid, don't think it's safe for a second, it's just another trick. Wait a little while and that flower will be back up again."

traits.locale_text: {n}Avec un sourire en coin, Batoshski découvre un tibia atrocement défiguré par une brûlure à l'acide.{/n} « Elles crachent des globules de sève corrosive qui ronge tout ce qu'elle touche. Et pour une raison quelconque, elles libèrent également des nuages de pollen, inoffensifs ceux-là. Mais si vous voyez une fleur se dissoudre dans une flaque d'acide, méfiez-vous, c'est encore un de ses subterfuges. Attendez quelques instants, et elle se relèvera comme par magie. »

languages.text: {n}Sırıtan Batoshski, asit yanığından iğrenç bir şekilde yara bere içinde kalmış kaval kemiğini sergiliyor.{/n} "Aşındırıcı bitki özü topakları tükürüyor. Değdikleri her şey cızırdayıp yanar. Ayrıca nedense polen de püskürtüyorlar. Bunlar zararsız duruyor tabii. Bir çiçeğin asit birikintisine dönüştüğünü görünce insan kendisini güvensiz hissediyor, başka bir numara olabilir diyor. Biraz beklediğinizde o çiçek tekrar ortaya çıkıyor zaten."
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski smirks, baring a shin hideously scarred by an acid burn.{/n} "It spits globs of caustic sap. Anything they hit gets sizzled. It also sprays pollen for some reason. It seems harmless though. But if you see a flower dissolve into a puddle of acid, don't think it's safe for a second, it's just another trick. Wait a little while and that flower will be back up again."

traits.locale_text: {n}Sırıtan Batoshski, asit yanığından iğrenç bir şekilde yara bere içinde kalmış kaval kemiğini sergiliyor.{/n} "Aşındırıcı bitki özü topakları tükürüyor. Değdikleri her şey cızırdayıp yanar. Ayrıca nedense polen de püskürtüyorlar. Bunlar zararsız duruyor tabii. Bir çiçeğin asit birikintisine dönüştüğünü görünce insan kendisini güvensiz hissediyor, başka bir numara olabilir diyor. Biraz beklediğinizde o çiçek tekrar ortaya çıkıyor zaten."

languages.text: {n}Batoshski sonríe irónicamente y se descubre la pantorrilla para enseñarte la cicatriz de una horrible quemadura química.{/n} «Escupe gotas de savia corrosiva que queman todo lo que tocan. También esparce polen, por algún motivo. Parece inofensivo... pero si ve una flor venenosa disolverse en un charco de ácido, no crea que ha pasado el peligro, porque es un truco. Espere un poco y verá que la flor se incorpora otra vez».
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski smirks, baring a shin hideously scarred by an acid burn.{/n} "It spits globs of caustic sap. Anything they hit gets sizzled. It also sprays pollen for some reason. It seems harmless though. But if you see a flower dissolve into a puddle of acid, don't think it's safe for a second, it's just another trick. Wait a little while and that flower will be back up again."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski sonríe irónicamente y se descubre la pantorrilla para enseñarte la cicatriz de una horrible quemadura química.{/n} «Escupe gotas de savia corrosiva que queman todo lo que tocan. También esparce polen, por algún motivo. Parece inofensivo... pero si ve una flor venenosa disolverse en un charco de ácido, no crea que ha pasado el peligro, porque es un truco. Espere un poco y verá que la flor se incorpora otra vez».

languages.text: {n}巴托什斯基咧嘴一笑，露出被酸液烧得狰狞可怖的小腿。{/n}“它会吐出腐蚀性汁液。被那东西沾上，立马就滋滋冒烟。不知为什么，它还会喷花粉，看着倒没什么危险。但如果您看见一朵花化成一滩酸液，不要掉以轻心，那是它的另一个诡计。等一会儿，那朵花就会重新立起来。”
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski smirks, baring a shin hideously scarred by an acid burn.{/n} "It spits globs of caustic sap. Anything they hit gets sizzled. It also sprays pollen for some reason. It seems harmless though. But if you see a flower dissolve into a puddle of acid, don't think it's safe for a second, it's just another trick. Wait a little while and that flower will be back up again."

traits.locale_text: {n}巴托什斯基咧嘴一笑，露出被酸液烧得狰狞可怖的小腿。{/n}“它会吐出腐蚀性汁液。被那东西沾上，立马就滋滋冒烟。不知为什么，它还会喷花粉，看着倒没什么危险。但如果您看见一朵花化成一滩酸液，不要掉以轻心，那是它的另一个诡计。等一会儿，那朵花就会重新立起来。”

languages.text: {n}Batoshski entblößt schmunzelnd sein von Säure verbranntes Schienbein.{/n} "Sie speit einen ätzenden Saft. Wer davon getroffen wird, tja. Außerdem stößt sie aus irgendeinem Grund Pollen aus. Die scheinen allerdings harmlos zu sein. Aber falls Ihr eine Blume seht, die sich zu einer Pfütze aus Säure auflöst, denkt nicht einmal daran, dass Ihr sicher seid. Das ist nur ein weiterer Trick. Es dauert nicht lange und die Blume ist wieder da."
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski smirks, baring a shin hideously scarred by an acid burn.{/n} "It spits globs of caustic sap. Anything they hit gets sizzled. It also sprays pollen for some reason. It seems harmless though. But if you see a flower dissolve into a puddle of acid, don't think it's safe for a second, it's just another trick. Wait a little while and that flower will be back up again."
